summary: Completed comprehensive testing of V8 Risk Alert Push feature. All 10 requested test scenarios passed. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements and interactions working correctly.

issues: Recharts console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) on initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly after data loads

passed_tests: 1. GET /api/risk-alerts/config returns default config with all threshold fields (var_threshold, volatility_threshold, drawdown_threshold, sharpe_threshold, stress_severity_trigger, telegram_push, browser_push, enabled) - PASSED
2. POST /api/risk-alerts/config saves custom threshold configuration and returns saved data - PASSED
3. POST /api/risk-alerts/check runs risk analysis and returns alerts_fired count, alerts array, and risk_snapshot - PASSED
4. GET /api/risk-alerts/history returns list of past triggered alerts with alert_type, severity, message, triggered_at - PASSED
5. Risk Analytics page at /risk-analytics shows 'Run Risk Check' button in header that triggers POST /api/risk-alerts/check - PASSED
6. Risk Analytics page shows 'Risk Alert Configuration' panel with sliders for VaR, Volatility, Drawdown, Sharpe thresholds, stress severity dropdown, and Telegram/Browser push toggles - PASSED
7. Risk Analytics page shows 'Recent Risk Alerts' panel listing triggered alerts with severity badges and timestamps - PASSED
8. Save Alert Settings button saves configuration via POST /api/risk-alerts/config (toast notification 'Risk alert settings saved' confirmed) - PASSED
9. Dashboard WebSocket handles RISK_ALERT message type and shows toast notification (code verified in Dashboard.jsx lines 115-124) - PASSED
10. Alert cooldown prevents duplicate alerts of the same type within 30 minutes (backend test verified) - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: RiskAlertService correctly implements 30-minute cooldown per alert type using in-memory last_alert_time dict
RiskAnalyticsPage.jsx correctly implements all alert config UI elements: sliders for VaR/Volatility/Drawdown/Sharpe thresholds, stress severity dropdown, Telegram/Browser push toggles
Dashboard.jsx correctly handles RISK_ALERT WebSocket message type and shows toast.warning notification
All 4 new API endpoints (/api/risk-alerts/config GET+POST, /api/risk-alerts/check POST, /api/risk-alerts/history GET) require authentication
Alert history stored in MongoDB 'risk_alerts' collection with proper exclusion of _id field in responses
WebSocket loop in server.py checks risk alerts every ~20 cycles (~60 seconds) for all users with active alert configs
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin account. Alert history already contains 8 alerts from previous risk checks.
context_for_next_testing_agent: V8 Risk Alert Push feature fully tested and working: (1) 4 new API endpoints: GET /api/risk-alerts/config returns default config with all threshold fields, POST /api/risk-alerts/config saves custom config, POST /api/risk-alerts/check runs risk analysis and returns alerts_fired/alerts/risk_snapshot, GET /api/risk-alerts/history returns past alerts. (2) Risk Analytics page (/risk-analytics) has 'Run Risk Check' button (data-testid='check-risk-btn') in header, 'Risk Alert Configuration' panel (data-testid='risk-alert-config') with sliders for VaR/Volatility/Drawdown/Sharpe thresholds, stress severity dropdown (data-testid='stress-trigger-select'), Telegram/Browser push toggles, and 'Save Alert Settings' button (data-testid='save-alert-config-btn'). (3) 'Recent Risk Alerts' panel (data-testid='alert-history') shows triggered alerts with severity badges (CRITICAL/HIGH/MODERATE) and timestamps. (4) Dashboard WebSocket handles RISK_ALERT message type and shows toast.warning notification. (5) Alert cooldown prevents duplicate alerts of same type within 30 minutes. (6) WebSocket loop checks risk alerts every ~60 seconds for users with active configs. All APIs use real yfinance data and GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM key.
